summary: Tested Permission Templates feature - Backend CRUD APIs and Frontend implementation. All backend tests pass. Frontend code reviewed and correct.
critical_code_review_comments: Alert.alert bug fix correctly implemented in templates.tsx and email-templates.tsx using Platform.OS check and window.confirm() for web
Permission Templates link correctly added to admin/index.tsx Tools section (lines 511-515) with proper role gating
permissionTemplatesAPI properly defined in services/api.ts with all CRUD operations
permission-templates.tsx page is comprehensive with modal forms, permission toggles, and apply-to-user functionality

success_rate.frontend: N/A - code review only due to session persistence issues with Playwright

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend Permission Templates API fully tested. Frontend page exists and code is correct. Playwright session persistence issue prevents full UI flow testing - each browser_automation call creates new session. Super admin user role may be changed to 'user' if apply template test runs. Reset role with: curl -X PUT 'URL/api/admin/users/69a0b7095fddcede09591667' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"role": "super_admin"}'

backend_api.GET /api/permission-templates/: Returns 4 prebuilt templates (sales_rep, senior_rep, sales_manager, org_admin)
backend_api.GET /api/permission-templates/{id}: Returns template details with permissions structure
backend_api.POST /api/permission-templates/: Creates custom template - requires X-User-ID header with admin role
backend_api.PUT /api/permission-templates/{id}: Updates custom template - cannot edit prebuilt
backend_api.DELETE /api/permission-templates/{id}: Deletes custom template - cannot delete prebuilt
backend_api.POST /api/permission-templates/{id}/appl: Applies template to user - requires admin role

frontend_code_verified.permission-templates.tsx: Management page with list, create, edit, delete, and apply functionality
frontend_code_verified.admin/index.tsx: Permission Templates link in Tools section for admin roles
frontend_code_verified.templates.tsx: SMS delete uses window.confirm() on web (bug fix)
frontend_code_verified.email-templates.tsx: Email delete uses window.confirm() on web (bug fix)

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - does not send real SMS
